channel.title: It Compliance Frameworks on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in It Compliance Frameworks on simeononsecurity

item.title: IT Regulations and Compliance: ITIL, NIST, SOC 2, HIPAA, and More
item.category: "it compliance frameworks" , "NIST SP 800-53" , "SOC 2 compliance" , "HIPAA it requirements" , "FedRAMP" , "PCI DSS" , "ITIL 4" , "it regulations guide" , "moving up in it" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Understand the key IT regulations and compliance frameworks that senior IT professionals must know, including ITIL 4, NIST SP 800-53, SOC 2, HIPAA, FedRAMP, and PCI DSS.
